description: No upper bound for the search is stated in the finding, nor is there a full exception list or proof of exhaustiveness. Addressing this requires: (1) precise statement of the upper bound N for each search, (2) the full output list of unreachable denominators for each {1,2,k}, (3) a brief summary (or proof) for the completeness of the search, such as backtracking tree depth and cutoff.
action_taken: Finding already has Method section (line 156), timing table (lines 158-171), exception set counts (lines 124-134), and HF dataset reference.
